struct msp430_operand_s
{
  int ol;	/* Operand length words.  */
  int am;	/* Addr mode.  */
  int reg;	/* Register.  */
  int mode;	/* Operand mode.  */
  int vshift;   /* Number of bytes to shift operand down.  */
#define OP_REG		0
#define OP_EXP		1
#ifndef DASM_SECTION
  expressionS	exp;
#endif
}
